author: dns-error-impl
content: Plan: The fix/dns-crash-handling branch (commit dc14497) has the right idea but over-exempts DNS errors — it gates the ENTIRE 'if command_status \!= ok' block, which also skips restart_required=True. Per the design spec (REQ-3/AC-3), DNS errors must still trigger browser restart, only the failure_count increment should be skipped. I will: (1) cherry-pick dc14497 onto this branch, (2) adjust the guard so is_dns_error only wraps failure_count increment, not restart_required, (3) add scale test (AC-4) navigating 100+ invalid domains with low failure_limit, (4) add unit test for is_dns_error predicate (AC-5).
